params.SpellDescription: For each planeswalker you control, you may activate one of its loyalty abilities once this turn as though none of its loyalty abilities had been activated this turn.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: For each planeswalker you control, you may activate one of its loyalty abilities once this turn as though none of its loyalty abilities had been activated this turn.

params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your end step, if you didn't activate a loyalty ability of a planeswalker this turn, you lose 2 life.
